LanguageData.TITAN_GeneticDrift.label: Genetic Drift
LanguageData.TITAN_GeneticDrift.description: Gene architecture drift causing discomfort; requires #0's resonance to correct.
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_BurnTrauma.label: Burn Trauma
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_BurnTrauma.description: Burn memory from escaping a fire. Will gradually fade over time.
